name: forgeflow
description: ForgeFlow: Explorer replacement, Projects manager, PowerShell execution control plane, and Dashboard.

commands.title: Git: Clean Project (Prune + Delete Gone + Delete Merged)

view/item/context.when: view == forgeflow.files && viewItem == forgeflowFile && resourceExtname == .sln && isWindows
view == forgeflow.files && viewItem == forgeflowFile && resourceExtname == .ps1 && isWindows
view == forgeflow.files && viewItem == forgeflowFavorite && resourceExtname == .sln && isWindows
view == forgeflow.files && viewItem == forgeflowFavorite && resourceExtname == .ps1 && isWindows
view == forgeflow.projects && viewItem == forgeflowProjectEntry && resourceExtname == .sln && isWindows
view == forgeflow.projects && viewItem == forgeflowProjectEntry && resourceExtname == .ps1 && isWindows
view == forgeflow.projects && viewItem == forgeflowProjectPinned && resourceExtname == .sln && isWindows
view == forgeflow.projects && viewItem == forgeflowProjectPinned && resourceExtname == .ps1 && isWindows
view == forgeflow.projects && viewItem == forgeflowProjectBrowseItem && resourceExtname == .sln && isWindows

forgeflow.files.favorites.description: Deprecated. Favorites are stored in global state.

forgeflow.projects.scanMaxDepth.description: Maximum directory depth when scanning for projects.

forgeflow.projects.identityScanDepth.description: Maximum folder depth for identity scanning (psd1/csproj/Directory.Build.props).

forgeflow.projects.identityPreferredFold.description: Preferred folder names when choosing identity files.

forgeflow.projects.modifiedScanDepth.description: Depth used to compute recent modified time across files.

forgeflow.projects.gitCommitCacheMinutes.description: Minutes to cache git commit timestamps before re-checking.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatch.description: Watch git HEAD for changes to keep commit sorting fresh.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatchMaxRepos.description: Maximum number of git repos to watch for changes.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatchDebounceMs.description: Debounce time in milliseconds for git watch refresh.

forgeflow.powershell.profiles.description: PowerShell profiles available for running scripts.

forgeflow.run.external.keepOpen.description: Keep external PowerShell window open after the script finishes.

forgeflow.run.externalAdmin.keepOpen.description: Keep elevated external PowerShell window open after the script finishes.

forgeflow.browser.preferred.description: Preferred browser for ForgeFlow: Open in Browser.

forgeflow.browser.fileExtensions.description: File extensions that trigger Alt+B browser open (without dots).

forgeflow.dashboard.hideArchived.description: Hide archived repositories from the dashboard.

forgeflow.git.staleDays.description: Age in days before a branch is considered stale.

forgeflow.git.defaultBranch.description: Default branch name used for merge checks when origin/HEAD is unavailable.

forgeflow.git.showCleanBranches.description: Show clean branches in the git hygiene view.

forgeflow.git.showProjectSummary.description: Show git branch summary badges in the Projects view.

scripts.test: npm run compile && npm run compile:test && mocha out/test/**/*.test.js
